description: Canonical lattice seed used for the bounded-operator readout of the five causal-wave coefficients. The lattice is the discrete causal-set of the Xi-graph at the canonical regime: a finite set of N events with a partial order defining causal predecessors, plus retarded-shell edge weights bounded by sup |W_ij^(n)| <= 1. The bundled value here is the canonical-regime size N=1539 used in all downstream constructions.

lattice.graph_type: Xi-graph (relational similarity matrix Xi_ij with M1-M3 axioms)

provenance: Documented in companion paper Paper 4 (emergent-gr-closure-repro); the same lattice is consumed by all four companion repositories with consistent N=1539 at the canonical regime.
